PUPPET_FILE
  PsiPuppetExpressionRegexImpl(EXPRESSION_REGEX)
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('osfamily')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(=~)('=~')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetRegexpImpl(REGEXP)
      PsiElement(REGEX)('/[:\n\/]/')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetExpressionRegexImpl(EXPRESSION_REGEX)
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('osfamily')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(=~)('=~')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetRegexpImpl(REGEXP)
      PsiElement(REGEX)('/[:\n\\/]/')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetExpressionRegexImpl(EXPRESSION_REGEX)
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('osfamily')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(=~)('=~')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetRegexpImpl(REGEXP)
      PsiElement(REGEX)('/[:\n\/\\/\\\/]/')
